heading: Filing of pleadings, motions, depositions, appendixes, briefs, and other papers
label: 393 Filing of pleadings, motions, depositions, appendixes, briefs, and other papers
notes: Effective DateSection applicable with respect to any general or special election for Representative in, or Resident Commissioner to, the Congress of the United States occurring after , see , set out as a note under .Dec. 5, 1969section 19 of Pub. L. 91–138section 381 of this title

children.text: delivering a copy thereof to the Clerk of the House of Representatives at his office in Washington, District of Columbia, or to a member of his staff at such office; or

mailing a copy thereof, by registered or certified mail, addressed to the Clerk at the House of Representatives, Washington, District of Columbia: , That if such copy is not actually received, another copy shall be filed within a reasonable time; andProvided
delivering or mailing, simultaneously with the delivery or mailing of a copy thereof under paragraphs (1) and (2) of this subsection, such additional copies as the committee may by rule prescribe.

children.label: b
children.text: All papers filed with the Clerk pursuant to this chapter shall be promptly transmitted by him to the committee.
